headline: Standardize Your Multi-Agent Workforce with The Agency
lede: This framework provides the structural blueprints needed to deploy specialized, personality-driven AI agents. By defining clear missions and operational deliverables, it allows engineering and design teams to scale their output through automated, role-specific workflows.

headline: Monitor Spaces Through Radio Waves with RuView
lede: Traditional cameras are no longer the sole method for spatial awareness. RuView leverages WiFi signal disturbances to track movement and biometrics, providing an infrastructure-free, privacy-preserving alternative for sensitive healthcare and security environments.

headline: Cataloging Scientific Reasoning in Claude Models
lede: A curated collection of methodology and technique for enhancing LLM performance in scientific inquiry. These records serve as an essential reference for researchers attempting to align synthetic intelligence with rigorous academic standards.

headline: Build Cross-Platform AI Companions with Project AIRI
lede: Bridge the gap between raw compute and virtual personality with this modular framework. Utilizing WebGPU and native backends, developers can finally deploy custom avatars that interact seamlessly across web, desktop, and mobile interfaces.

headline: Automate Codebase Maintenance Directly from the Shell
lede: Codebuff shifts AI-assisted development from browser-based chat to the terminal’s native workflow. This multi-agent suite offers precise, programmatic control over file edits and reviews, ensuring your pipeline remains under developer command.

headline: Scaling Autonomous Agent Workflows with AgentScope
lede: Building complex, multi-agent systems requires a robust foundation for reasoning and tool utilization. This framework maps out the essential abstractions—from memory hubs to deployment protocols—necessary for graduating prototypes into full-scale production environments.

headline: Managing Agent Context with File-Based Memory
lede: ReMe decouples agent knowledge from opaque database structures by routing information through readable Markdown files. This hybrid retrieval system ensures long-term continuity by balancing vector search performance with the clarity of a persistent, audit-ready filesystem.

headline: Optimizing Large Language Model Caching Strategies
lede: Performance bottlenecks in LLM deployments often stem from redundant context processing. LMCache provides the benchmarking data and implementation strategies to drastically improve inference speeds through intelligent caching of model states.

headline: Deploying Robust Data Analytics with Apache Superset
lede: A battle-tested foundation for modern data exploration and visualization. Superset delivers the reliability required by enterprise teams, offering a scalable engine to transform complex datasets into actionable business intelligence.

headline: Hardening Cloud Infrastructure with Trivy
lede: Trivy serves as the primary defense against misconfigurations and vulnerabilities within the CI/CD pipeline. By generating automated software bills of materials, it ensures that your containerized environments remain compliant and secure.
